channel.title: Home on Patrick McSweeny
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Patrick McSweeny

item.title: Hello World
item.description: Welcome to my blog. I have been developing software for a long time and have gathered some thoughts, and I plan to share them here.

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

I am passionate about collaborating with others to design and build software that solves problems for humans. Ruby on Rails has been my tech stack of choice since 2012, but my main focus has been on building quality software, and that has allowed me to be adaptable and work in across a range of industries. For much of my career, my job title has been “software engineer”, but I have always been interested in designing software as well.
